item.title: About
item.author: victor@vmmazz.tech (Victor Mota Mazzei)
item.description:
I’m Victor, nice to meet you! I’m a developer, a father, and an enthusiast in areas like security, networking, DevOps, and related fields.

In this blog, I’ll be sharing a lot of information on the topics I mentioned, always aiming to bring real-world examples in a simple and approachable way.

Hope you enjoy it!

item.title: Initial Commit
item.author: victor@vmmazz.tech (Victor Mota Mazzei)
item.description:
## Welcome!

In this first post, my story begins!

I want to share a lot about the topics that fascinate me, bring in situations from my day-to-day as a back-end developer, and explain concepts in a simple way, always tying them to a dev’s daily life.

Cya! 😄
